_comment: Portable social-pipeline defaults so a FRESH git clone runs the SAME setup as the owner — tokens excluded (those live in Settings → API Keys / flowork.db, never pushed). Loaded on boot by seedSocialDefaults(): the schedule is installed ONLY when trigger_rules is empty (never clobbers an existing schedule); flowork_tele_link is set per group only when absent. Ratio = 2 trending : 1 promo per channel (Telegram/X/Dev.to). Times are server-local (owner runs the PC 20:00-24:00 WIB).
